user_goal: 在 B017 经验签收（B015 regime-aware activation 不缩窄 B013 vs 60/40 gap；B016 HRP 不缩窄 B010 vs 60/40 gap，HRP -$496 + turnover +41%）之后，做 gap root-cause attribution 批次：用 B014 真实 yfinance snapshot 量化 B013 与 B010 vs static 60/40 的 absolute-return gap 来源，按资产 / 按策略 layer（L1 / L2 / L3 / defensive routing）做归因，并跨三轴做参数 sensitivity sweep（vol_target {5,8,10,12,15}% × universe ablation 4-5 variant × rebalance cadence 3-4 variant）；输出诊断报告含至少 3 个 Pareto-style 配置推荐（low-DD / balanced / high-return 带具体 trade-off 数字）。**B018 不修改任何 strategy / spec / 测试默认参数**（任何 retune 候选只入 backlog）。保留 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、纯 stdlib trade/ 模块（无 scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn）、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。
generator_handoff: B018 F001-F002 done (2/5 features); status → verifying for Codex F003-F005. Generator tooling delivered: (1) trade/analysis/__init__.py (package marker), (2) trade/analysis/pnl_attribution.py — PeriodAttribution / AttributionInput / AttributionReport dataclasses + B010_LAYERS=('l2_vol_scaling','defensive_routing') + B013_LAYERS=('l1_gating','l2_vol_scaling','l3_crisis_cut','defensive_routing') constants + public functions compute_per_asset_contribution, compute_per_layer_contribution, attribution_summary, compute_period_asset_returns. Per-asset = signed dollar contribution to strategy total return (sum_t capital * weight * return). Per-layer = capital * parked_fraction * (defensive_return - avg_risk_return) per layer; defensive_routing reads base_defensive_share, others read parked_by_layer dict. avg_risk_return excludes defensive_asset. Pure stdlib. (3) trade/analysis/parameter_sweep.py — SweepWindow + SweepRunResult + UniverseVariant dataclasses + constants DEFAULT_VOL_TARGETS=(0.05,0.08,0.10,0.12,0.15), DEFAULT_UNIVERSE_VARIANTS (full/drop_sgov/drop_stabilizers/spy_ief/spy_only), DEFAULT_CADENCES=(monthly,quarterly,semiannual,annual), STRATEGY_B010/STRATEGY_B013 labels, STATUS_RAN/STATUS_SKIPPED, DIMENSION_VOL_TARGET/UNIVERSE/CADENCE. Public sweep entries: run_vol_target_sweep, run_universe_ablation_sweep, run_cadence_sweep — each takes (records, strategy_name, values, windows, backtest_parameters=None) and returns deterministic list[SweepRunResult] with ending_value/gap_vs_60_40/max_drawdown/turnover/transaction_costs/sharpe/rebalance_count. SweepWindow takes optional benchmark_ending_value for per-window gap calc (None ⇒ gap=0). Override configs constructed via dataclasses.replace; strategy defaults never mutated (verified by tests). Cadence sweep derives quarterly/semiannual/annual from monthly signal-dates via stride filtering; unknown cadences (e.g. 'weekly') skipped with diagnostic. Universe ablation rejects variants missing required defensive_asset (B010) or defensive_symbol+regime_spy_symbol+risk_core (B013); skipped row contains explicit reason. Any backtest exception during a window is caught and reported as skipped (preserves sweep determinism). Tests: tests/unit/test_pnl_attribution.py (23 cases) + tests/unit/test_parameter_sweep.py (24 cases). Full sweep 573 PASS, mypy strict clean (files=['trade']), ruff clean (trade+tests+scripts), compileall clean. Codex F003-F005 acceptance — please run on real B014 manifest (data/public-cache/regime-adaptive-prices-manifest.json): (F003) call compute_period_asset_returns + attribution_summary on B013 and B010 vs static_60_40 (load via trade.strategies.risk_parity_hrp_comparison.load_static_60_40_baseline from B014 sidecar) across calm window 2020-06-01..2022-12-31 + 2020-02-01..2020-12-31 + 2022-01-01..2022-12-31, write JSON sections 1-3 to docs/test-reports/B018-gap-attribution-2026-MM-DD.json. To populate per-period parked_by_layer for B013, walk regime_adaptive.backtest results and compute the marginal exposure routed by each layer (gated weights from gating_result, 1-exposure_scale from L2, 1-regime_factor from L3); for B010 use 1-exposure_scale on the only layer. (F004) call run_vol_target_sweep + run_universe_ablation_sweep + run_cadence_sweep for both strategies across the three windows; append sweep tables to JSON sections 4-6. Pass benchmark_ending_value=static_60_40_ending for the calm window so gap_vs_60_40 is meaningful (set to None for stress windows where 60/40 sub-window ending isn't precomputed, or compute on the fly from B014 sidecar equity_curve). (F005) emit Markdown report at docs/test-reports/B018-gap-attribution-2026-MM-DD.md with all 9 sections + at least 3 Pareto-style configurations (low-DD/balanced/high-return) and write signoff at docs/test-reports/B018-gap-attribution-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md. Optional backlog entry only if a clear actionable retune candidate emerges. B018 itself does NOT modify B010/B013 default parameters. Suggested verification commands: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q; .venv/bin/python -m mypy trade; .venv/bin/python -m ruff check trade tests scripts; .venv/bin/python -m compileall -q trade tests scripts.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-15 B018 planning: B017 done wrap-up closed with two negative findings (B015 regime activation policy did NOT shrink B013 gap; B016 HRP did NOT shrink B010 gap). Planner did MVP analysis vs PRD §10/§11/§4/§12 — concluded MVP is functionally complete (5/6 §12 milestones done, last one is Broker Adapter Paper which crosses §5 non-MVP line). Identified the B017 negative findings as a research debt: gap source between B013/B010 and static 60/40 remains unknown despite the two excluded hypotheses. User selected option 1 (推荐方向 B018 Gap root-cause attribution). Decisions captured: (1) mixed batch (2 generator F001-F002 + 3 codex F003-F005); (2) new analysis modules under trade/analysis/, pure stdlib like rest of trade/ (no scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn); (3) parameter sweep covers vol_target ∈ {0.05, 0.08, 0.10, 0.12, 0.15} + universe ablation (full / drop_SGOV / drop_stabilizers / SPY+IEF / SPY only) + cadence (monthly / quarterly / semiannual / annual); (4) override configs constructed inline, NEVER mutate strategy defaults; (5) diagnostic report with at least 3 Pareto-style recommendations with concrete trade-off numbers; (6) B018 does NOT modify B010/B013/B011/B015/B016 defaults — any retune is a follow-up batch candidate; (7) backwards-compat: existing tests unchanged; (8) manifest-absent fallback: synthetic 9-asset fixture + skipped semantics; (9) reports research-only. Wrote B018 spec and features.json (5 features). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-15 B018 F001 + F002 done; status → verifying for Codex F003-F005. F001: trade/analysis/pnl_attribution.py pure-stdlib gap attribution (per-asset signed dollar contribution + per-layer parked-fraction × (defensive - avg_risk) × capital, with defensive_routing reading base_defensive_share and other layers reading parked_by_layer dict). avg_risk_return excludes named defensive_asset. compute_period_asset_returns helper derives per-period asset returns from prices_by_symbol + boundary tuples. 23 unit tests cover per-asset signs / aggregation / zero-capital / missing-return / single-asset / empty + per-layer B010 drag / B013 each layer / defensive_routing base share / sum-approximately-matches-total-gap canned case / empty / zero-capital + attribution_summary total_gap / missing benchmark / no periods + helper at-or-before / pre-history / omits-missing + defensive filter + no-defensive-asset graceful + per-asset sum identity. F002: trade/analysis/parameter_sweep.py pure-stdlib sweep harness with SweepWindow / SweepRunResult / UniverseVariant + spec-mandated constants (DEFAULT_VOL_TARGETS, DEFAULT_UNIVERSE_VARIANTS with full/drop_sgov/drop_stabilizers/spy_ief/spy_only, DEFAULT_CADENCES with monthly/quarterly/semiannual/annual). Public sweep functions run_vol_target_sweep / run_universe_ablation_sweep / run_cadence_sweep accept records + strategy_name + values + windows + optional backtest_parameters; return deterministic list[SweepRunResult]. Override configs constructed via dataclasses.replace; strategy defaults provably untouched (frozen dataclasses can't be mutated and tests verify defaults equal before/after). Cadence sweep derives quarterly/semiannual/annual from monthly signal-dates via stride filtering (3/6/12); unsupported cadences (e.g. 'weekly', 'biweekly') skipped with diagnostic listing supported set. Universe ablation rejects variants missing required defensive_asset (B010) or defensive_symbol/regime_spy_symbol/risk_core (B013); skipped row contains explicit reason. Any backtest exception during a window caught and reported as skipped (preserves sweep determinism even if synthetic fixture has insufficient history). Vol-target sweep skips non-positive targets. Synthetic fixture for tests extended to 800 weekdays starting 2022-01-03 (covers through ~Jan 2025) so T+1 execution dates exist for the test windows ending 2024-04-30. 24 unit tests: vol-target count / determinism / no-mutation / gap-vs-benchmark / skipped-non-positive; universe ablation supported / skipped-missing-defensive / skipped-missing-spy / no-mutation / default-variants-set; cadence all-supported / quarterly-fewer-rebalances / unknown-skipped / annual-on-short-window / no-mutation; unknown-strategy-rejected on all three; default constants match spec; build_monthly_signal_dates last-day-of-month + reversed-window. Full sweep: 573 tests PASS (549 + 24 new), mypy strict clean (files=['trade']), ruff clean (trade+tests+scripts), compileall clean. State machine: status → verifying; generator_handoff written with concrete Codex steps + verification commands.
